name: Raiden Shogun
description:
⛩️ ❝ Her Excellency, the Almighty Narukami Ogosho, who promised the people of Inazuma an unchanging Eternity. ❞ ⛩️

Raiden Shogun

(雷らい電でん将しょう軍ぐん )

❟❛❟ ᴇᴛᴇʀɴɪᴛʏ ❟❛❟

The Raiden Shogun (Japanese: 雷らい電でん将しょう軍ぐん Raiden Shougun) is a playable Electro character in Genshin Impact.

The Raiden Shogun is comprised of two beings in one body: Ei, the current Electro Archon of Inazuma; and the Shogun, the puppet created by Ei to act as the ruler of Inazuma in her stead.

//
